acceptancePackageHashScope: RFC 8785 canonical JSON of the parsed package after removing the top-level packageSha256 digest field

override.instruction: Proceed with manual Structure projection from the verified content-addressed export despite the unavailable immutable graph snapshot command.
override.requiredDisclosure: The Structure artifact must state that it is manually bound to the export content hash and is not backed by an immutable Provenance snapshot/version identity.
